# static/app/manifest.txt — assembly order for static/app.html.
#
# static/app.html is GENERATED: build.rs (via crates/app-html-assembler)
# concatenates the fragments below, in this order, into static/app.html.
# Edit the fragments, never the generated file. Blank lines and #-comments
# here are ignored. Every .css/.js/.html file in this directory must be
# listed exactly once — the assembler fails the build otherwise.
00-head.html
09-style-open.html

09-styles-fonts.css
10-styles-shell.css
11-styles-access-files.css
12-styles-tasks-log.css
13-styles-sessions-terminal.css
14-styles-displays-voice.css
16-styles-v2-tokens.css
ui2-chrome.css
ui2-voice.css
19-style-close.html

20-shell.html
21-access-dialogs.html
22-voice-bootstrap.html
23-voice-dialogs.html
ui2-shell.html

30-module-open.html
31-ui2-foundation.js
ui2-chrome.js
ui2-voice.js
31-init-identity-fleet.js
32-vault-custody.js
33-station-core.js
34-station-panes.js
35-station-diff-viewer.js
36-voice-wasm-init.js
37-uicommand-changes-control.js
38-managed-context.js
39-session-windows.js

40-session-launch.js
41-session-window-actions.js
42-usage-terminal.js
43-access-panes.js
